title: Random Stuff
description: As the title says it adds random stuff from early to End
body:
Random Stuff is kinda like Additional Additions but with wierder items such as Void Pellet and Uranium Cake :)\
It adds bunch of stuff from Enriched Copper Ingot to the most wierd Qontum Stick and Pentaxod every item from here can be used to make other things and better stuff\
This mod is Good to be used in other's mod to add more difficulty to make items.

Dependencies
- Optional **Ancient Technology** -> https://modrinth.com/mod/ancienttechnology\
Why it is optional? its because needed to make Void Pellet and other things, and again WHY ? because i don't want to spend time for other things.

- In 1.1 Update the Dependency of the `Ancient Technology Mod` will NO longer be required Why?
..... JUST STOP ASKING, the recipes that required from the other mod will be removed tehre u go now let me live this life.

This mod is also made in Mcreator.\
If you want to contact me on discord my name is > NGeorge#5042

The source code will not be available for this mod since you can decompile the jar without any problems since the `JAR` is deobfuscated
